description: MBA-relevant role taxonomy with O*NET occupation codes, skill requirements, and motivation profiles

roles.description: Drives product strategy, roadmap, and execution for technology products. MBA interns typically own a feature or product area, working cross-functionally with engineering, design, and data teams.
barrier_conditions: No demonstrated interest in technology or digital products
Unable to articulate user-centric thinking or empathy for end users
No experience working cross-functionally or influencing without authority
expected_signals: Prior product ownership or product-adjacent experience
Evidence of data-informed decision making
Track record of shipping features or products end-to-end
Technical fluency demonstrated through projects or prior roles

roles.description: Manages product strategy for healthcare technology platforms including EHR systems, telehealth, clinical decision support, and patient engagement tools. MBA interns navigate regulated environments while driving user-centered innovation.
barrier_conditions: No interest in healthcare or social impact domains
Discomfort working within heavy regulatory constraints
No experience with complex stakeholder environments
expected_signals: Prior healthcare, biotech, or life sciences experience
Evidence of navigating regulated or compliance-heavy environments
Demonstrated empathy for patient or clinician end users
Interest in health equity or access articulated in application materials

roles.description: Leads product development for education technology platforms including LMS, adaptive learning, and student engagement tools. MBA interns balance pedagogical outcomes with product metrics and business viability.
barrier_conditions: No passion for education or learning outcomes
Inability to balance mission-driven work with business metrics
No experience with user research or empathy-driven design
expected_signals: Prior teaching, tutoring, or education sector experience
Demonstrated interest in learning outcomes and student success
Experience building or improving tools for non-technical users
Evidence of mission-driven career trajectory

roles.description: Advises organizations on operational efficiency, organizational strategy, and business transformation. MBA interns work on client engagements solving structured business problems with data-driven recommendations.
barrier_conditions: Inability to structure ambiguous problems into workable frameworks
Poor communication or presentation skills
Unwillingness to travel or work in high-intensity client environments
expected_signals: Strong case interview performance or structured thinking examples
Prior client-facing or advisory experience
Evidence of rapid learning across industries
Leadership in team-based project delivery

roles.description: Focuses on high-level corporate strategy including market entry, growth strategy, M&A diligence, and competitive positioning. MBA interns conduct deep market analyses and develop strategic recommendations for C-suite clients.
barrier_conditions: No quantitative or analytical foundation
Inability to synthesize large amounts of information into clear recommendations
No demonstrated interest in business strategy or competitive dynamics
expected_signals: Prior strategy, corporate development, or investment banking experience
Strong academic record in analytical or quantitative disciplines
Published analyses, strategy case competition wins, or thought leadership
Evidence of CEO-level or board-level communication ability

roles.description: Works within a corporation's strategy team on market assessment, competitive intelligence, growth initiatives, and strategic planning. MBA interns support executive decision-making with research and financial analysis.
barrier_conditions: No financial literacy or modeling capability
Inability to work within corporate hierarchy and influence senior stakeholders
No experience synthesizing market data into actionable strategy
expected_signals: Prior corporate strategy, consulting, or business development experience
Evidence of building business cases or investment memos
Track record of influencing strategic decisions with analysis
Industry-specific knowledge relevant to the target company

roles.description: Leads analytics initiatives that drive business decisions through data infrastructure, dashboards, and statistical analysis. MBA interns bridge technical data work with business stakeholder needs and strategic framing.
barrier_conditions: No quantitative background or statistical literacy
No hands-on experience with data tools (SQL, Python, or BI platforms)
Inability to translate technical findings into business recommendations
expected_signals: Prior analytics, data science, or quantitative research experience
Portfolio of data projects or dashboards
Evidence of using data to drive business decisions
Comfort with ambiguous data problems and iterative analysis

roles.description: Designs and maintains BI dashboards, reporting systems, and data pipelines that support organizational decision-making. MBA interns typically own a reporting domain and build self-serve analytics capabilities.
barrier_conditions: No SQL or database querying experience
No experience with visualization or reporting tools
Inability to connect data insights to business outcomes
expected_signals: Prior BI, analytics, or reporting experience
Proficiency in at least one major BI tool
Evidence of building dashboards used by business stakeholders
Comfort with data quality issues and ETL challenges

roles.description: Oversees business operations including process optimization, resource allocation, and cross-functional coordination. MBA interns lead operational improvement projects and drive efficiency across teams.
barrier_conditions: No experience managing or improving operational processes
Discomfort with detailed execution and follow-through
No quantitative skills for measuring process improvements
expected_signals: Prior operations, supply chain, or process improvement experience
Evidence of measurable efficiency gains in past roles
Track record of managing cross-functional initiatives
Comfort with both strategic thinking and tactical execution

roles.description: Analyzes and optimizes supply chain operations including procurement, logistics, inventory management, and demand planning. MBA interns typically lead a supply chain improvement initiative or build analytical models.
barrier_conditions: No quantitative or analytical skills
No interest in operations or logistics domains
No experience with data-driven process optimization
expected_signals: Prior supply chain, logistics, or manufacturing experience
Evidence of optimization or cost reduction projects
Familiarity with supply chain planning tools or ERP systems
Quantitative skills applied to operational problems

roles.description: Drives digital transformation in government agencies, improving citizen-facing services through technology modernization, UX design, and agile delivery. MBA interns work on high-impact civic technology projects.
barrier_conditions: No interest in public service or civic impact
Inability to work within bureaucratic constraints and slow-moving organizations
No experience navigating complex stakeholder environments
expected_signals: Prior government, nonprofit, or public sector experience
Demonstrated commitment to public service or social impact
Experience with digital transformation or technology modernization
Comfort working in ambiguous, resource-constrained environments

roles.description: Applies data analytics and evidence-based methods to improve government operations, policy evaluation, and program outcomes. MBA interns build dashboards, conduct analyses, and present findings to agency leadership.
barrier_conditions: No quantitative or analytical background
No interest in government or public policy domains
Inability to communicate technical findings to non-technical audiences
expected_signals: Prior government, policy research, or public sector analytics experience
Evidence of using data to improve program outcomes
Demonstrated public service orientation
Experience presenting analytical findings to leadership

roles.description: Evaluates startup investment opportunities, conducts market research and due diligence, and supports portfolio company operations. MBA interns source deals, build investment memos, and attend pitch meetings.
barrier_conditions: No financial literacy or valuation skills
No demonstrated interest in startups or innovation ecosystems
Inability to evaluate business models and market opportunities
expected_signals: Prior startup, investing, or entrepreneurial experience
Evidence of deal sourcing, thesis development, or investment analysis
Strong network in startup or technology ecosystems
Published writing on market trends or investment theses

roles.description: Supports deal execution, portfolio company management, and investment analysis for private equity funds. MBA interns build LBO models, conduct due diligence, and work directly with portfolio company management teams.
barrier_conditions: No financial modeling or accounting foundation
No prior finance, banking, or investing experience
Inability to work under high-pressure, detail-intensive conditions
expected_signals: Prior investment banking, consulting, or investing experience
Advanced financial modeling skills demonstrated through work or coursework
Evidence of deal execution or transaction experience
Strong quantitative academic background

roles.description: Develops and executes marketing strategies including brand positioning, demand generation, and customer acquisition. MBA interns typically own a channel, campaign, or segment strategy.
barrier_conditions: No customer-facing or market-oriented experience
Inability to balance creative and analytical thinking
No experience with data-driven marketing or campaign measurement
expected_signals: Prior marketing, brand management, or customer insights experience
Evidence of data-driven campaign optimization
Strong storytelling and positioning skills in application materials
Understanding of customer acquisition funnels and metrics

roles.description: Performs financial analysis, forecasting, budgeting, and reporting to support corporate decision-making. MBA interns build financial models, analyze variances, and present recommendations to finance leadership.
barrier_conditions: No financial literacy or accounting knowledge
No experience with financial modeling or spreadsheet analysis
Inability to translate financial data into business insights
expected_signals: Prior finance, accounting, or FP&A experience
Strong Excel and financial modeling skills
CFA, CPA, or finance-specific certifications or coursework
Evidence of supporting executive decision-making with analysis

roles.description: Manages complex technology programs spanning multiple teams, workstreams, and delivery milestones. MBA interns coordinate cross-functional execution, manage stakeholder communications, and drive program-level decisions.
barrier_conditions: No experience managing multi-workstream initiatives
No technical fluency or comfort working with engineering teams
Inability to manage ambiguity and competing priorities
expected_signals: Prior program management, technical project management, or IT leadership experience
Evidence of managing complex, multi-stakeholder initiatives
Track record of delivering programs on time and within scope
Comfort navigating technical and business conversations

roles.description: Operates as a generalist in early-stage startups, handling strategy, operations, fundraising support, and team-building. MBA interns wear multiple hats and drive high-priority initiatives directly with founders.
barrier_conditions: No comfort with ambiguity, rapid context-switching, or undefined roles
Need for structured processes and clear organizational hierarchy
No entrepreneurial or small-team experience
expected_signals: Prior startup, entrepreneurial, or founding experience
Evidence of thriving in ambiguous, resource-constrained environments
Track record of wearing multiple hats and delivering across functions
Demonstrated bias toward action and scrappy execution

roles.description: Advises health systems, providers, and payers on digital transformation initiatives, operating model redesign, and technology-enabled care delivery improvements. Clinical experience is leveraged to translate frontline realities into pragmatic strategic recommendations.
barrier_conditions: No interest in healthcare systems or care delivery contexts
Discomfort with client-facing advisory work and ambiguity
Limited ability to synthesize operational and strategic recommendations
expected_signals: Clinical background or direct healthcare experience
Exposure to hospital or health system operations
Interest in digital health tools or transformation initiatives
Evidence of cross-functional leadership in complex environments

roles.description: Shapes strategy for digital health ventures and health system innovation teams, combining clinical context with product and business strategy to improve care access, quality, and operational performance.
barrier_conditions: No interest in healthcare innovation or digital tools
Discomfort navigating ambiguity across business, clinical, and product stakeholders
Limited strategic synthesis capability for cross-functional initiatives
expected_signals: Clinical or healthcare background
Interest in health tech, digital tools, or care transformation
Evidence of strategic problem-solving in complex systems
MBA pivot narrative linking clinical insight to innovation goals
